ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station collecting the data */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "precipIntensity" REAL /* Precipitation intensity */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "apparentTemperature" REAL /* Apparent temperature */,
  "dewPoint" REAL /* Dew point */,
  "windSpeed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "cloudCover" REAL /* Cloud cover */,
  "uvIndex" REAL /* UV index */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility */,
  "windGust" REAL /* Maximum wind speed during the recording period */,
  "windDirection" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "cloudType" TEXT /* Type of cloud cover */,
  "solarRadiation" REAL /* Solar radiation */,
  "snowDepth" REAL /* Depth of snow */,
  "qualityFlag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating data accuracy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station generating the forecast */,
  "forecast_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the forecast */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Forecasted temperature */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Forecasted precipitation */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Forecasted cloud cover */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Forecasted humidity */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Forecasted atmospheric pressure */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Forecasted visibility */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Forecasted maximum wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Forecasted wind direction */,
  "cloud_type" TEXT /* Forecasted type of cloud cover */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Forecasted solar radiation */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Forecasted snow depth */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data or forecast being accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast used for the report */,
  "report_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the report */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the report */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast used for the alert */,
  "alert_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
